alert.title: PodCrashLooping: recommender-svc
alert.body: recommender-svc pods restarting repeatedly; memory usage at 100% of limit before restart

signals.title: recommender-svc memory
signals.body: heap climbed steadily to memory limit; out of memory before each restart

signals.title: recommender-svc kill
signals.body: OOMKilled: java heap space exceeded; killed process 1

signals.title: traffic
signals.body: request volume up 3x due to flash sale, driving larger in-memory candidate sets

signals.title: Deploy recommender-svc v1.9
signals.body: deploy earlier in the day, stable for 7 hours (unrelated red herring)

ground_truth.root_cause: Recommender-svc ran out of memory (OOMKilled) under 3x flash-sale traffic; heap exceeded limit
acceptable_next_steps: Add backpressure or cap candidate-set size
